keyword-control.name: keyword.control.larp
keyword-control.match: \b(if|otherwise if|otherwise|while|for each|repeat|times|end|try|if something goes wrong|stop and say|do at the same time|wait for)\b

keyword-declaration.name: keyword.declaration.larp
keyword-declaration.match: \b(set fixed|set|to|create function|create a blueprint called|based on|bring in|share function|share|as|with|and|in|for)\b

keyword-action.name: keyword.other.larp
keyword-action.match: \b(say|give back|check that|is equal to|equal to|a new|a list containing|a map containing)\b

keyword-builtin.name: support.function.larp
keyword-builtin.match: \b(ask ai|get request to|post request to|with body|read file|write|connect to database|run query|get environment variable|start app on port|when a request comes to|respond with|create a server|square root of|uppercase of|lowercase of|round|trim|split|by|join|length of|type of|current time|error message)\b
